reviews.review_text: Great big grassy sites, lovely staff even provided firewood for the fire pit. Beautiful place, thoroughly enjoyed our stay, will definitely be back.

This is a fantastic holiday park. We stayed on a powered site next to our friends in a very spacious but sheltered spot. Kodi & Kyle, who checked us in, were very friendly, full of useful information & nothing was too much trouble. Kudos to them! Anthony (the boss) was also an amazing host & goes out of his way to make sure you’re happy. He also makes great gin! We’ll be back!

We came over to Robe for a friends funeral and forgot our EV charger cord. The owner allowed us to use there charger and leave our car to charge overnight even though we were not staying at the site. She met us after hours and dropped us back to our accommodation back in the town centre. What an amazing family business. Thank you

Robe Holiday Park was absolutely beautiful. It's in such a great spot, nice and quiet with the main street and beaches so close. We were arriving late and the process of arriving and setting up was seamless 😊 We will definitely be back and cannot wait.

Wonderful bush style caravan park.
We stayed in a very spacious powered sites with lush grass,  protected by tea trees.
Amenities are individual toilet/ shower rooms which were cleaned daily.
Highly recommended .
Thank you Kobi and Kyle

Robe Holiday Park was an idyllic spot for a family camping trip. Its natural setting amongst the bush scrub, essential facilities at each campsite including water tap and power points and clean, central bathroom facilities provided simple yet effective amenities for comfort.

The jumping pillow is always a favourite with the kids, but it’s not over developed so the kids could also focus on enjoying the natural surroundings such as bush tracks to the beach and creeks.

As a family owned business, the staff were very friendly and hospitable. We were very grateful for their extended service of posting back a precious item of my daughters left behind.

We’re looking forward to returning for our next family Easter trip and I’d highly recommend to others.

Such a beautiful park to stay in , the set out is amazing with bush like camping and the best of both worlds.  The beach and lake right at your door step, the staff were very kind and helpful,  showers, toilets, kitchen,  all very well maintained and can't wait to go back and spend more time. Thanks for a awesome stay you guys should be proud of your efforts.

Robe Holiday Park had a very spacious site to back our caravan into. Easy to turn around with van behind car, and lovely green grass everywhere. The amenities were modern & clean. The park is well sheltered from the wind, so not a problem with the awning.

Lovely dog friendly caravan park, owner/manager answered the phone after hours and found me a quiet, sheltered spot close to amenities (which were spotless). Large sites, clean amenities, quiet and friendly. Recommended!

Staying here three nights end of March in our 7.4m motorhome and it's awesome. Staff are unbelievably helpful and the powered bush site we are on is quiet and private. They said they actively try to place families with kids in certain areas not near couples, and try to not put campers right next to each other where possible. Also only 1.5km from town.
Will be back for sure 😃

This place was awesome! Anthony who organised our stay was incredible, really friendly and easy to deal with. Even with our late check-in, he still came all the way to help us, which was amazing. What a legend! The rooms were very clean, and the toilets, kitchen, and everything else were in great condition. Would definitely recommend this place!

This place was amazing! Anthony who helped us with the accommodation was next level , such a friendly and nice guy. Even though we checked in late at night, he still drove all the way to help us. Absolute legend! The rooms were super clean, and the toilets, kitchen, everything was in perfect shape. Couldn’t ask for better. Highly recommend this place

Wow!! What an amayzing place to stay. It's not often you arrive after a long drive and the first thing you do after setting up is to take a deep beathe in and BREATH!!
So peacefull. Big sites that can accommodate the biggest vans easily. Whether you prefer lovely green grassy spots  or bushy campsites with power & water, this place can cater for either. It also has awesome amenities. Thank you for a great stay. I hope to be back. Cheers Adrian

We visied mid March. I loved it. Lots of green grass to put caravan on and some lovely trees. It was out of the wind so we could put out our awning.  Facilities ok, with camp kitchen that was wonderfully clean and inviting. It even had TWO ovens, one of which I used. Washing Machines were fine, with a cold wash $3 and a line to hang things on.
Small children took advantage of the bouncy pillow and the surrounding sand.
Clean well maintained camp ground with spacious van sites. Amenities are clean modern and spacious, friendly and helpful hosts.
Great location. Lovely little cabin, all the essentials provided.
Highly reccomend this park. Friendly and helpfull management. Great location.

Robe Holiday Park offers a variety of camping options; tent camping, caravans/motorhomes, on-site cabins etc. The grounds are expansive, surrounded by native bush land and the sites are spacious.||The park is conveniently located approx. five minutes from town, where you will find everything you need and it’s just a short walk to Long Beach.||Although there are no sites with a private ensuite, the amenities blocks are made up of a number of self-contained ensuite bathrooms with toilet, bathroom vanity and shower - all very modern and in clean ‘as new’ condition.||Anthony was so welcoming and very knowledgeable about the park and the town. ||We would highly recommend Robe Holiday Park for its location, tranquil bushland setting and amenities.

This is an amazing spot, you will feel as you are actually in the bush withal the amenities.  Suite for shower and toilet.   It is like having your own bathroom for the time. Very clean. Bounce for the kids... but very quiet... grass sites..
We will be back again that is for sure

5th Visit!!
An Amazing park, can’t wait to return.
Friendly helpful staff, good spacious sites and the best amenities we can seen in a caravan park, very clean and tidy.
Love that they ensuite style.
If you looking for a great beach getaway or a base to explore from you can’t go past this park, suitable to all styles of travellers singles, couples family’s and pet friendly (sites) as well.
We love a grass site in front section so can watch what’s going on but if you prefer sites tucked away or bush sites they have them all or maybe a cabin.

A short walk across road to the inlet and a nice cliff top walk into town or across the foot bridge and along long beach.

See you again soon
Leuke camping, gebouwen wat verouderd. De receptie is een Heritage paardenstal. Je kan watersporten op het meer. Strand is dichtbij en ook het dorp met leuke winkels en eetgelegenheden.

THE BEST CARAVAN PARK. We have stayed in many caravan parks, but nothing compares to Robe Holiday Park. This park gives you the feeling like you’re fully off the grid in the bush but actually in a super convenient location and access to fantastic facilities. Easy walk to Long Beach and into Town.
The owner was super friendly and welcoming.

We will be back! Thanks guys 😊

Great Park with many nice sites and a really nice layout allowing everyone there to feel like there are not to many other near by.

I was there for 5 nights including a long weekend and the facilites were kept remarkably clean.

I was there with a group, and we had  great spot.  Will definetly come back again.
Enjoyable stay, lovely park.  Felt like we were staying in the wilderness with excellent ammenities.  We will be back next year.
Had a great time. Well managed and maintained park.

One of the greatest parks I've honestly stayed at, from the massive room to park a caravan and still have so much room after any awning that's out.
We had a boys trip to Robe from Melbourne, we were 7 cars and the friendly staff booked us a site of 3, had plenty of room for our central kitchen to swags and tents!
Not to mention the private toilet and shower ensuite 👌🏽👌🏽
Definitely will be back to stay here again, Awesome place 🤙🏽

Take the time to meet the people behind the parks we stay at. Had a wonderful discussion  to understand the highs and lows of van parks  and owning one. The effort they put into upkeeping, maintenance and looking after the many various issues arising every day. Robe holiday Park is one hell of a place to stay provides all the necessary facilities  and entertainment for families and kids. Would recommend a stay there and time. Thank you

We had a great size powered site. The shower and toilets were roomy and clean.  The park is huge with a playground for kids. It has some great little areas to camp that are a bit more private which also have power. If you would prefer they also have cabins available as well. Great staff very friendly and helpful. I have my preferred site number and would happily stay again.

Fantastic site
Very clean and well maintained.
Professional and friendly staff.excellent facilities.
Definitely book again thank you

First time staying at Robe Holiday Park, we booked this park for its natural bush environment and weren’t disappointed.  Even though it was the end of summer, the grassed areas were lush. So many options for sites, in the action or out in the quiet. There’s a site for everyone.
The park is well presented and clean, showers and toilets are also well setup.
Anthony and Keryn and all the staff are super friendly and helpful. 2027 is already booked.  Looking forward to another gin slushie!!
... has absolutely everything! Lovely place. :-)
Stayed at a powered site. Was greeted nicely by the man in the office upon arrival. Very spacious camping sites and bathrooms kept to standard by the cleaners. Very nice area

We stayed here for Victoria Labour Day long weekend and we loved it.

Park was lovely - amenities were probably the best we’ve ever seen.

We will definitely be back in the future and we will absolutely recommend to family and friends! ☀️🐚

One word  .. MAGNIFICENT   .. We have been travelling around Aussie since 2018  .. 20 times across the Nullarbor  .. have completed the full lap.  Have stayed in many caravan parks  .. but this one is the best. Location, sites, amenities, resort style.
Will definitely stay here again.
Keep up the great work.
The Wandering Weston's
Ian & Ellen

This is an awesome caravan park and the best in Robe (IMO). The sites are large, the staff are so friendly and accommodating and the amenities are always so clean, modern and just lovely. Will definitely be back.

Anthony and the team were amazing during our stay.  Had a great site with so much space around us. Really loved having all the trees around and it felt like we were not at a typical caravan park. It was so refreshing

we stayed here on a sunday night our way to mount gambier and it was beautiful. when booking the guy on the phone gave us very helpful advice about petrol and the surrounding area - the bathrooms at the campsite were beautifully clean and private, toilet & shower in one room, an experience we haven’t had so far campervanning around aus. The staff seemed friendly on arrival and we had lots of space where we were (site 24) and even saw a wild wombat at night!
loved this place and would come back. keep up the good work ☺️

We camped here for three nights,
BEAUTIFUL Park, Anthony, the owner was very friendly &
Informative, local info was great.The park is very quiet & peaceful… plenty of space..
An easy walk into town along the trail, right above the beach with lovely views..
Clean well cared for park amongst gums ..
We will definitely return & recommend

I'm someone who usually opts for nation park camping over caravan parks, but Robe holiday park did not disappoint. I stayed in their Bush camp section which exceeded expectations. The campsites were well considered, and really gave you that 'off the grid' feeling while still having access to site power/water and all the other bits that come with a caravan park. (Most importantly showers.) The utility blocks were all super clean and well looked after.
Will definitely be back.

When I booked I asked the Lady at reception for a site with a bit more solitude and it was perfect.
We have two young girls who like to run laugh and play sometimes too loudly. A spacious park like this amougnst the trees and green grass was great.
Nice to visit a park that doesn't pack people in so close it's ridiculous.
Thank you and recommend
Heoi

We have stayed here quite a few times. We are impressed with the bushland setting, great amenities, friendly staff but especially the large sites. If you want the resort experience, with pools, spas, waterslides, out door cinema, bike track, then don't come here, as none of these are here.. If you want peace and quiet,then come here. Yes there's a jumping pillow, but children need to make their own fun here and there is plenty of space to do that. Ride the bike, play cricket, kick the footy, or sit around and play games. Don't think as you drive in that its a small park,it isn't. It has a second section which is as large as the first. There is also a section in the dunes for bush camping but all these have power and water. There are facilities scattered throughout the park, including a large kitchens in each section. It is a place to explore. You will be pleasantly surprised. We were.
Fantastic camping. Amazing facilities. So clean and well maintained
Amazing park with large sites surrounded by trees. Great helpful staff and clean newer amenities.

We stayed at a powered bush site, it was fabulous. Secluded but still close to the facilities.
The individual shower rooms are great, much better than a shower block. They were clean & the shower has good pressure and water temp.
The staff were friendly and helpful.
Absolutely CRACKING park! Amazing staff, super clean bathrooms, grass is top notch - and the Gin is for the win! 100% coming back, and making this a regular spot 👌
Very nice place to stay.
Great spacious sites and quality amenities. Just a few minutes to Robe town and a few minutes to Long Beach. We’ll be back!
Amazing place to stay, perfect environment with great staff to help, perfect location and nice facilities, coffee available in mornings was special!

This has to be one of the nicest holiday parks we have stayed in.  There is so much space on each site which we need to accommodate our family and camping gear.  We had a lovely site which backed onto bushland and was wonderfully sheltered by surrounding trees.  This holiday park is massive but it doesn't feel like it.  The amenities were immaculately clean at all times which is tricky in peak summer period but staff did a great job.  What we also really appreciated is how respectful all other guests were in the park around us, it was so quiet in the evenings and people were just nice! We will definitely be back at some stage to visit lovely Robe.  It's a short drive into town but in our opinion absolutely the better option when you see how squeezed in everyone is at other holiday parks in town.  Thanks RHP for a great week away.  If you're lucky you might also see / hear wombats of an evening ;)

This place has a park-like spacious camping area with lovely grass and plenty of tree cover. Campers were spaced out enough to give privacy while still being close to amenities.
About 30 minutes walk along the coastline to the centre of Robe.
Choose this one!!
Great park quiet location very relaxed & with very well appointed cabins.

Very disappointing experience.
The bathroom facilities were not properly maintained during our stay. Floors were left dirty, the bathrooms were smelly, and one morning there was no toilet paper at all.

What was even more disappointing was the complete lack of empathy shown by management when we had to leave a day early to take our daughter to Mount Gambier Hospital. There was no care or understanding shown, no refund offered- only a credit, despite them being fully aware that we would not be travelling back in their direction to use it.

Overall, the lack of cleanliness and basic compassion made this a very poor experience. We would not stay again.
Highly recommend Robe holiday park, they gave us a lot of good information of what we needed to see as it was our first time visiting robe . Caravan park is well equipped and lots of space
Perfect, lots of room, lots of grass
Nice beautiful cabins. Good location and service.

Powered site.
Nice people to deal with.
Lovely site and surrounds

Lonely yet serene. Magpie chirpping. Soothing breeze, 13c sunny. Love this sweet relaxing overnight stay. Comfortable stay at this property.2 mins drive to the main street. Shops in Robe shut down by 830pm. Be self prepared for fodd if arriving late.Only one last pizza shop opens till 10pm. Highly recommended.

Stayed in one of their beautiful, fully equipped and well maintained cabins. The slots for caravan are great, surrounded by lots of greenary, well spaced and quiet too. Our hosts are warm and very welcoming, ensuring our needs are met during our stay.
Location wise is ok, in case you will need to drive back to town to grab something;, it's just a short 3-5mins drive which I don't mind, as the park is located away from the busy tourist traffic and noise in the town. Will definitely book to stay in this park if we travel to Robe again for holidays.

Great park, its our second stay here.
Will return again.
Excellent location, great facilities. Staff very friendly and helpful! Highly recommend!
Large Powered site was great grassy the park was extremely clean

Nice bushy park in great location. However bizzare with a myriad of sites available and park not busy we were only offered sites next to jumping pillow - travelling without children is not are preferred spot , or other sites crowded next to people even though loads of more remote sites available.
Biggest concern was appalling ignorance in relation to cat being allowed to roam free and decimate local wildlife ! would not return specifically due to that

2nd time here, and we will come back many times yet. You feel like you're in the bush, you wouldn't know the town of Robe is walking distance away. Great amenities, large sites, well spread out for privacy, peace and calm. Staff are super friendly, it's our happy place.
Great park. Facilities are immaculate and sites are so spacious. 100% coming back!!!

What a great place! The staff are so friendly and helpful.
The caravan sites are very spacious, and the ameneties clean.
Wish we could have stayed longer!

We received a warm welcome, excellent service, and great hospitality. The facilities were clean, and we met wonderful people while watching the Aussie Rules game. The surroundings were beautifully green, and it was very quiet at night. We would love to stay longer next time.

Lovely park. Roomy sites.
Friendly very obliging management.
Large solar panels on site must allow for the lovely hot showers with heat lamps to keep the shower area warm on a cold night.
Will definitely stay again when in area.

Fabulous park, setting& amenities. Love the natural setting & layout of of the park. Staff friendly and helpful. Great to see all the solar cells. So much thought has been put into this park& it was appreciated. Would highly recommend
Stayed for one night on powered site. Great location, so peaceful and beautiful surroundings. Great price and awesome service.
A beautiful park set amongst the forest. Our cabin was very comfortable and had everything we needed. Our hosts were very friendly and helpful. A great place to stay.
Nous avons eu un très joli bungalow, neuf, bien équipé et confortable. Le site est un peu excentré par rapport à Robe.

Had a great stay at the Robe Holiday Park, loved that we were surrounded by bushland and the cabin we stayed in was fantastic, the bathroom was beautiful and it was the best one we have ever had on all our  stays in  caravan pks, The owner Anthony was so helpful and knowledgeable of the area and gave us great advice, will definitely stay there on our next visit. Dianne and Darryl
Beautiful, Spacious, clean & comfortable cabins. Excellent newly renovated bathrooms. Good parking spot. Lovely bug balcony to sit on. Friendly staff - thank you for a very nice stay.

The holiday park was quite empty during winter and we almost had the whole space to ourselves. We booked a powered site for 1 night. The camp kitchen is big (but cold in winter as there was no heat/airconditioning). Plenty of space to use and there was a coin operated washing machine & dryer. The bathroom is common use and there are heated light bulbs in the shower rooms to keep warm after taking our shower. Area is clean and well maintained. There is also a jumping pillow for kids.

We booked a powered site at Robe Holiday Park, it is absolutely great. Very spacious and amenities were very clean and practical. Took a walk around the rest of the park to check it out, and all the sites were very spacious and some were quite secluded. We give this park a huge thumbs up. Thank you for great service when checking in.

What an awesome park.
Anthony's service was 2nd to none.
Booking was easy, check in was easy, and our 3 van sites were perfect, as well as being full of local knowledge and happy to share it.
Anthony delivered fire wood to the fire pit for a beautiful evening.
Camp kitchen, toilets and showers were all great.
Thanks for an awesome stay.

Absolutely stunning caravan park.  The surroundings were stunning with trees everywhere, a communal fire pit, an opportunity to meet other campers. Would certainly say come and stay, you won't be disappointed. Just to let people know, the servo opposite foodland, has a deceiving diesel price. It's an extra 20c a litre during the day. 199 something then 178 something after hours, don't fall for it like we did. Get your fuel after hours, might not seem like a lot for some, but to holiday makers, it all adds up.

We had a caravan site, the sites were large, facilities toilets were cleaned throughout the day and were very clean, single toilet and bathrooms were available which was great for families with kids for showering. Jumping pillow was great for the kids, staff were very helpful and kind. Close to town, great walking and bike riding at the site for kids. Perfect for families. We will be back thank you

This is one of my fav cabins I've ever stayed in. There are 8 in total and whilst nestled together, they all face away from eachother so there is a sense of privacy. There's a porch with table and a spacious open plan layout.
The cons may be that kids may not fall asleep until adults do as the bedrooms aren't seperate. Also, don't leave anything opened on counter as it may bring out the ants.
Overall, the park is beautiful and quiet. Would stay again.

Stayed here for one night over Easter. They were very accommodating when we didn’t have a booking and let us park for one night.
Very good facilities, clean and modern showers and toilets and a huge camp kitchen.
They also do a drinks van selling gin and sell local gin at the office too.
Close to the beach and walks and staff very helpful and friendly with directions.
Highly recommend. Also great for families as you’ll see from other reviews.
Very roomy cabin with great deck. Cabins are well spaced apart with ample space for car. Loved how everything is nestled amongst bushland. Walk into Robe is about 15 mins.

We found the location ideal.  Our tent site was in a great location close to amenitiies for my elderly father who found the location ideal as well.  The kitchen/common room is modern with good showers and toilets.  Only suggestion would be a small shelf in the showers to put shampoo and soap as we had to put everything on the floor in the shower, otherwise everything was clean and great.

Amazing park. Massive sites. Not like seaview which pack you in like sardines. If you have kids park up near the jumping pillow. New and clean Toilets, amazing kitchen area. Would return in a heartbeat.
A beautiful park, lovely service and fantastic facilities. Stayed in a powered site. Such a well maintained park. Loved every moment of our stay.
Stayed in our camper trailer here. Great spot. Clean facilities and the people were great. Quiet enough Wombats were in the camp area.

We had a powered site in a beautiful grassed area. The park is really big with lots of open grassed areas as well as plenty of secluded private little niches. Anthony was a fabulous host very welcoming & helpful.  Amenities & camp kitchen were top notch. Look forward to returning
Great park clean amenities enjoyed our stay and Anthony was great with our booking and location of our vans.😃

Easy 5 star one of the best places I’ve stayed staff were amazing. Dog friendly
Beautiful town and beaches
Excellent place to stay in Tents. The camp areas are isolated and surrounded by trees, great pivacy. Also amenities are kept so clean. This is one of a kind. I will definately come back.

Thank you Antony for your excellent service..we had a couple of initial teething issues with allocated site but Antony resolved them and couldn't have been friendlier.
I recommend this caravan park ..

We stayed there for 3 days with our camper. Friendly reception. The park feels huge so depending where you are, you will have a different experience. The good parts: grassy areas, mostly levelled, quite big spaces, feels clean, great amenities modern and clean, great laundry and kitchen, feels very bushy, not too far from town by car. The not so good: we were quite far from the nearest toilet. Still great value
Absolutely gorgeous campsite. Loved our powered site amongst the trees. Good amenities, really lovely staff. Lovely walk to local beach and a great walk into town too.

Had initially booked at another park, and as we changed our mind very quickly after arrival, called Robe Holiday Park to see if they had space for us last minute. The owner Anthony found us a suitable site last minute and was extremely helpful and welcoming. This park is family friendly, well kept, and surrounded by bush (with visiting wombats at night). Can’t fault this place and we thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

Absolutely loved this Caravan Park. The van site itself was grassy with trees and a lovely feel. The amenities were amazing, the 'shared' toilet block consisted of your own toilet/shower combination. Staff were polite and very accommodating.

Best Caravan Park we have stayed at. Clean, very well run, large grassy sites, amenities super clean and well maintained, staff great! If you're ever in Robe check this place out! You won't be disappointed.

After doing some Goole-ing at the numerous Robe camp options, we kept coming back to Robe Holiday Park. And we are SO glad we booked here.
We had a friendly welcome upon arrival from the owner and he shows flexability with site options along with a detailed run through of the Robe attractions.
The bushy, spacious and quiet setting was perfect and to be honest it's even better than the pictures.
5 stars for our camp site and the clean amenities. A special thanks for the multiple hooks in the shower areas, you really need quite a few!
Thanks for having us, we hope to return again.
Great park. Well maintained, clean and shady and grassed sites. Amenities are great also.

What a gem of a park, we have never come across such amazing amenities, our very own bathroom!  Our powered site was just lovely, and the camp kitchen was wonderful. We will definitely be back to visit again. Oh, last but not least, lovely staff to greet us!

Wow, what a beautiful park this was, we made lovely friends whilst there and the walk to the beach was so easy. You won't probably find amenities like the ones in this park, unbelievable! The staff were fantastic too!  Do yourself a Favour and visit this park!

Cabin was xcellent,lovely beds,very clean ,cabins well spaced among the trees and well apart from others.
All in all a great 👍 place .

Lovely park. Pet friendly. The sites were large, amenities clean, tidy, very friendly staff, well presented park. Camp kitchen was lovely, large fridge , plenty of seating, a television and some cooking equipment, very clean and tidy. We will be back!
Great camp spots with plenty of shade.

What a great place, friendly, helpful staff, well maintained, lots of different camping options to cater for all.  We usually camp in National Parks so chose a powered bush camp site, just perfect balance of seclusion with access to facilities, and all within easy reach of Robe itself.  Highly recommended 👌

Wow what a park, so many options of having our 9 metre van (towball to rear bumper) in different locations from a grass site to a bush feel site and majority will have shade across the van at some part of the day.  Oh and the sites are big enough to be on your site comfortably without being too close to neighbors.  We had a grass site.  The staff are top notch and happy to accommodate us with our request of changing the initial site.  Thanks to Lucy for the warm chats when booking to the warm welcome we felt when checking in.  We will definately be back, next time with the doggies. :)
Nicely spread out. Facilities very well maintained
Amazing staff, friendly and very helpful.

Perfect for our needs- quiet, protected from wind, spotless en suite amenities, grassy sites. We have had a week here and hope to return one day. Thank you to all the staff who work hard to make this a very enjoyable location.

Another great stay at this little gem in the SA south east. Once again we arrive to find further improvements/upgrades to the park. The hosts and there staff alway have the park and amenities in top order. Also very helpful with all local tourism information and any needs for all staying at the park.
Only 48 weeks until we’re back.

Couldn’t ask for a better park and hospitality.  Beautiful scenery, excellent facilities and the showers are better than mine at home.  From bush camp sites to  luscious grass sites…we have always been impressed and thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Oh and the  gin and coffee liqueur made by the owner is bloody top notch 😊

We stayed for 6 nights in a roomy grassy spot perfect for our caravan and 2 small tents for the kids. The location is perfect - walking/cycling track to town closeby and the beach 5 mins away. Loads of 4WD tracks bringing you to beautiful beaches. The camping itself has a great vibe. Good and clean amenities, and quiet at night. We loved the company of the tabby camping cat Batman who got so attached to us (what we like to think anyway) that he wanted to sleep the day away on one of our beds inside and demanded to be let in at 7am, lol! What a cutie!! We’ll be back for sure.

We have been travelling to campsites all over Aus for over 20 years. Although this Holiday Park was at a lovely destination, the service, communication and caravan site location really let it down.
If I can recommend anything - please don't stay in site 161. It is directly in front of the dump point and toilet block. The smell was effluent and of foul sewage 24/7. We were unable to eat at our site, in our van and the entire time we camped had to be spent away from our setup. We requested twice to move sites - we were told someone would get back to us. 4 days later and still no word. We decided to leave early as the smell was unbearable. We requested a refund for the final 2 nights due to the odour. however the staff pretended like we'd never asked to move, even though we had seen the camp owner come and inspect the area and reinforce the screws over the drainage after our calls to move sites. There were several sites we could have moved to that were vacant for the time we stayed. We are so disappointed we were ignored and neglected. We paid for 7 nights so expected some kind of compensation. I have since emailed the owners/staff and they have brushed us again, denying all contact made with them requesting the move. We just wanted a nice family trip with our 3 children over Xmas/NY but unfortunately it wasn't to be.
A nice caravan park - but please don't stay anywhere near site 161.

First time at this Holiday Park and wow! We were so impressed!! We have been to alot of caravan parks around Australia and in our opinion this has been the cleanest by far. Immaculate camp kitchen and toilets/showers. The grounds were very manicured and there was never any rubbish lying around.  Every time I asked the staff anything, nothing was too hard, very friendly and efficient. I recommend this place and we will definitely be back!!!  The location is perfectly in the centre of everything. Perfect and thanks for a wonderful adventurous family holiday ❤️❤️❤️❤️
Great space and location, easy access to trails and beach

We stayed here for 3 nights over Christmas.
Upon booking there were very accommodating and helped us choose the best site for us and our kids (3&6).

Even on a scorcher of a day on christmas they had sprinklers going off for the kids.

I highly rate this place and would come back here again.
We stayed for 3 nights and had a lively peacful stay. Anthony and Keryn were very friendly and helpful. Will recommend this park anytime. THANK YOU FOR HAVING US.
Lovely owners/management & best camp showers 🫶 there’s a bike path close by that takes you to the main drag of town

Fantastic caravan park , large grass sites, good camp kitchen , laundry and very well maintained facilities . Plenty of walking tracks around and terrific location - Walking distance to town and beautiful beaches . Friendly hosts allowing early check in and site near family . An enjoyable stay  ! Would definitely stay here again :)
Great place manger/owner great bloke very informative and advised us re fishing and finding wombats for the kids to see. Cabins very nice and everything very clean and tidy.

We stayed for 2 days on a powered caravan site. We are self contained but do use the abolution block. The abolution block had way too many moggies/mozzie alive and dead. The caravan site We had, the green mesh on the ground needed a really good clean. Had weeds growing through it and needed some maintenance. Grass was nice and green though. The park has lots of mozzies/moggies outside at night or arvo so made us itchy when we sat outside.  Otherwise our stay was good.
Loved this place. We stayed over the weekend. The owners are great people. The park is lush and quiet. The local wombats visiting were a highlight as was Robe Gin. Definitely will be back here.
Absolutely beautiful place

Fantastic park! Owner was friendly, helpful and knowledgeable about the area. We stayed for two nights - large grassy sites amongst the bush, heaps of room, communal fire pits and spotlessly clean amenities! Great 2 km coastal walk into the town which is well worth doing. Would highly recommend this park - we’ll be back!!
Peaceful location among nature. Stayed in a cabin with great facilities.

WE had booked in for just a night on our journey back from Adelaide to home in Melbourne. we had booked a cabin which was terrific. ||Being winter, the reverse cycle conditioner was on heat and the cabin was comfy warm. The kitchen area was very well set up for meals and had plenty of crockery and   utensils. Sharp knives were a bonus which enabled us to prepare a delicious southern rock lobster which we had purchased in the town are.||Sitting area was great, TV was excellent and the eating area was great as well. Sleep was a pleasure in a very comfortable bed. Great shower and water pressure in the morning.
Great park big sites for your van, great staff Great tour of the gin distillery , great communal fire and they supplied the timber, had a great time

The best caravan Park I have ever stayed in.
Fantastic people,giving fantastic service.Supplied us with fire wood ever night. Nothing was too much trouble. Beautiful open sites.
Clean and comfortable
Very friendly staff and beautiful place.

Will definitely be back!
Did have little mishap but staff especially Charlie were amazing, making us feel very welcome and comfortable.
Beautiful bushland, large, grassy, private sites (had 84-86 powered sites) which made us feel like we were camping, even enjoyed the fire pit at night and saw wombats, fantastic!
Last but favourite part, must try the Gin, its some good stuff!!
Thanks Robe!

A beautiful spot to stay as a young family. Plenty for the kids to do including the jumping pillow and the lake just off of the park was fun to explore (the kids favourite part of the trip).
We stayed in a cabin and it was lovely and felt just like home. Comfy beds and spacious cabin.
The staff were very helpful and friendly and the park's cat "Batman" was a real hit.
Cabins nice and clean, bed a bit uncomfortable but a really nicely maintained park, a lot of camping spots. Only a few minutes drive from Main Street

I stayed here over the Easter long weekend and could not recommend this park highly enough. Very impressed with the staff and upkeep of the park. Charlie was incredibly welcoming upon arrival sharing lots of things to do in town and once checked in Lachie visited our site to see how we were settling in. Although busy we didn’t feel like we were on top of our neighbours and had a great large grassy site close to excellent amenities (best I’ve come across yet!). 10/10 highly recommend.

Highly recommend Robe Holiday Park. The friendly caring reception we received after a failed attempt at reaching The Gums for our first night was so appreciated. We were placed in a quiet beautiful bush site perfect for us. The amenities were great spacious private fabulous shower. We woke and decided to stay another night and hope we get similar on our 6week road trip to the West and back.

Had a great stay over the Easter long weekend here! Such a beautiful grassy park with so much space and fun activities on over the weekend like wine tasting and pop up gin caravan with dim sims (Anthony the owner distils his own gin on the property which was delicious!). Even in the crazy busy easter rush the toilets were always pretty clean and the staff were super attentive - Charlie in the office and Lachie on the grounds always checking in making sure we were looked after. Will be back for sure, thanks team!

Had an awesome time at the Robe Holiday Park. Anthony the owner is a legend, and Lachie and Charlie went above and beyond to make our stay comfortable! The gin bar (which Anthony makes on-site) was super tasty, and amenities were top tier! Definitely coming back!

Recently spent 7 days here with our caravan. We loved it!! Large grassy sites and peace and quiet. Our pooch loved it too. An added bonus was a tour and tasting at the onsite gin distillery. Needless to say a few bottles made it back to the van!! Highly recommended and will stay here again in the future. BTW… I visited and walked around the other CPs in Robe and this CP is a clear standout!! A credit to the owners and team!!

Great park with large grassy sites. Plenty of space to set up for a few nights and loads of room to park the car. Plenty of walking tracks around town and one starts just outside the back gate to the park where you can walk all the way through town to the Obelisk.

We stayed mid week so lots of free sites to either side of us.

Great park with large grassy sites. Plenty of space to set up for a few nights and loads of room to park the car. ||A large number of walking tracks around town and one starts just outside the back gate to the park where you can walk all the way through town to the Obelisk.||We stayed mid week so lots of free sites to either side of us.||While it’s not in the middle of town the park is protected from the windy coast.

"2 bedroom cabin with ensuite" only has one bedroom with bunks and a queen bed in the living area.
Floors are absolutely filthy. Our baby was on the ground for less than 10 minutes before hands and legs were pretty much completely black. Very disappointing.
Had to get down with wet wipes just to try and get it half decent. If you're not going to clean the floors, at least supply a mop or something.
The park map is confusing and shows a loop road around the cabins that doesn't exist.

Friendliest service, owners truly invested in giving you a great experience of the town, facilities first class clean and tidy. Toilet block like an en-suite, with some seperate toilets as well as toilet shower cubicles. Bbq areas clean and easy rubbish access, cannot fault this place. Well done to the owners no doubt it’s a full time
Job!

Home now in boort vic after a 15 night stay at a powered site, cant wait to get back next year for a 3 week stay .A special thank you to all the fantastic staff that made the stay an incredible experience ,service like it should be nothing was a problem to them thanks team
Great campsites and bathrooms. Not too busy during the week.
Was a great place to stay. Only problem was the floors were very dirty.
Stayed a week...loved it! The wombats at night were a bonus! Beautiful,huge grassy sites.
A large park in a lovely bush setting with spacious grassed sites.  It has a jumping pillow for the kids, and the amenities are amazing!  The bathrooms are nicer than our one at home!

Spent a week in early Jan 2024 at a powered caravan site.  We had an awesome week.  Massive caravan space for our 22ft van, bush setting and with green grass under feet to top it off.  Plenty of space for the kids to play cricket, great hosts, clean facilities.
Will be back!

My husband and I have travelled Australia and the Robe Holiday Park is our most favourite park we have stayed in...beautiful big, private sites, clean amenities and wonderful hosts. The gin... delicious ! What more could you want !

We stayed for a week on a powered site. The site was HUGE which made everything so much more comfortable. Anthony & Keryn were perfect hosts and couldn’t do enough for us. Great, clean facilities and we loved the gin van!!
Great beds great showers friendly staff and quiet location. Nice cabins Well worth a visit .
Great environment

I just spent a week at Robe Holiday Park and WOW what a great introduction to Robe! My un-powered camp site was spacious, comfortable and the facilities were next level. The one thing that was better then all that was the customer service, hospitality and assistance provided by Michelle and Tomo both prior to my arrival and more so helping me by way of a grinder, for a padlock that i forgot the key to, and then helping me hook up my camper when leaving, always available to help where they could. They are the kind of Park Managers that make you come back again and again, thank you and see ya next time.

Disappointed caravan place in SA during peak season for travelling. You have to spend a lot of bucks for a little piece of grass for the small tent the facility is poor, a hundred of people share a three toilets and two showers, always a long queue, though there are few bathrooms, but considering this is hundreds of people capacity Park. Besides, you maybe have teenagers neighbours, lot of noise, even after 10pm, you pay much value while you may not rest well or enjoy camping life.

Stayed at the park over new years, facilities were great and clean, staff were so lovely when booking and welcoming on arrival. Bush sites were spacious, park was in a great location and walking distance to town, we will be back next year!
The hostess with the mostess Tomo made our trip first class.
Don’t go anywhere else when I’m robe. Love this place and great for swagging with new and maintained amenities!

My wife and I are just at the end of a week long stay before the start of the peak season. We wanted a little break and this has been one of the nicest parks we have ever stayed at.
From the original booking call to the peaceful and beautifully kept surroundings this park has been great the staff always friendly and helpful.
Lovely grassed sites, great amenities and just the right distance to everything.
Highly recommend this park for a relaxing time.
Very well presented park ,facilities were excellent, management extremely helpful
Pretty quiet, large sites well grassed. Bit cheaper than other parks. Friendly staff

Camping formidable :emplacements, sanitaires, cuisine, les managers very very nice. Emplacement avec électricité pour mon van 1 nuit 1 personne 35$. Hyper calme. On peut aller à pied à Robe via the costal way, 30' aller.

Had a wonderful two night stay with our kids and grandkids! The park is immaculately kept with exceptional facilities, Tommo and his lovely wife are so very hospitable, highly recommend a stay here when in Robe

Very impressed with the ever-present and extremely friendly, attentive and engaging staff. Individual toilets and toilet/showers are more like modern ensuites than a caravan park toilet block. Nice grassed powered camp sites side by side but also noticed some fantastic, little private sites, surrounded by bush. Fantastic for those who like to keep to themselves. We happy campers

Great caravan and camping park. Lots of space best toilet block and very friendly and helpful staff. Grass sight. Not far from town OUT OF THE WIND. Still close enough to walk to shop and swimming beaches ⛱️
Nice spot to stay for a few nights, water and powered sites, showers, laundry, kids play area.
An amazing park with well appointed clean cabins in a peaceful setting. Great value and very friendly  staff/managers.

Very friendly host who was very helpful with everything. Clean and large sites. Lots of amenities and super huge camp kitchen that was always clean. Could easily walk to town and beach. Great place to stay.
Great park.nice bush sites.great camp kitchen and toilets .$42 anite for powered sites.just out of town.
Absolutely gorgeous park with friendly staff and fantastic cabins & facilities. Highly recommended

Most incredible holiday park we’ve ever been too, stayed both in the Bush powered sire and the cabins.
The owners are such truly genuine lovely people and go above and beyond to make the park so clean and magnificent.
I’d feel so safe to come camping here on my own as a female.
Facilities are so clean it’s blown my mind.
So glad I found this place and will be back over and over again!
Thanks guys!!!
Great place to stay.  Roomy grassed sites. Excellent facilities. Sunny.
Stayed 2 nights. Lovely grassed sites. Happy, friendly staff. Even when called on in the night. Nice outfit TOMO  no h. Recommend to anyone. Beautiful large park. Thank for putting up with us.😜
Loved the bushland type setting of this park, and the occasional visit at night from a wombat.

Very Scary Angry staff Lady. Abusive and terrifying NOT family friendly. Do not stay here if you have kids!
Our first night was scary and stressful.
Me and my husband was in bed he was fast asleep while my kids in the other room was hanging out and my toddler was playing with his cars.
We were surprised at around 9pm when the Angry staff lady was banging on our door  like she was a Cop doing a drug search. I was terrified she was yelling and screaming while she knock hard to open the door. My husband woke up and was hurriying up to get dress to get to the door she got more impatient and knock harder and yelled louder and louder to open the door. When my husband opened the door she demanded to go in the room and inspect our cabin for animals.
We told her there were no animals in the cabin and she didn't take our word for it she came inside and saw it was just our kids in the other room. She left the cabin without a apology or anything.   Then my toddler started running to give me a hug. Then she came back banging on the door again to tell us to keep the noise GONE Quiet like we were in Jail or in a detention Centre!!
MY toddler wasn't even screaming or crying!! He was just walking and giggling.
My older kids was so scared of the experience and felt invaded by her coming in the room while they were lying down.
We have never been treated like this in any accommodation we have ever stayed at.
We felt abused,  harrased and mistreated.
My husband spoke to the male staff in the morning and the guy apologised to him.
The guy was extremely nice but the lady didn't apologise for her disgusting attitude towards us.
We will never come back here again!
HORRIBLE EXPERIENCE!

We also found a HUGE spider in the kids room.
Super clean, hot showers, big grassy sites, plenty of shade, communal fire pit: what's not to like.....

Great holiday park , quiet , spacious grassy sites . Excellent amenities with ensuites .
Park management was very welcoming .
Clean great amenities and happy staff. Highly recommended
Great value for money. Will definitely stay there, in the future.
We stayed here on a powered camp site for 1 night on our way through. Very quiet campsite as it’s winter but amazing service and the amenities were 5 star! Hotel level bathroom and more.
What a great caravan park over 180 sites ! Feels like your camping in a national park but with all the luxuries. You can walk to the beach and the lake!

Recently visited Robe and stayed at this fantastic park. Can’t fault it. Beautiful large, green lawn sites, brilliant amenities, dog friendly and very obliging staff. The weather wasn’t the best during our stay but this park was extremely sheltered and a pleasure to come back to after a day exploring the area.
Caravan Park best camp kitchen  ever
Great park without all the kerbs and channelling. The best camp kitchen. Friendly staff and a terrific location. Sites are huge!

Stayed here in a cabin for 2 nights as part of our scouting for holiday destinations with my wife and son. Very clean facilities with coffee and tea facilities. Cutlery was very clean and so was the kitchen. Very tidy bathroom with hot shower. Special thanks to the owners who arranged for our late arrival die to bad wheather on the way there. They facilitated easy access to our cabin and even has the room heater on so it was warm and cozy when we got there. We felt very welcome and valued as customers. Would highly recommend this place to friends . Thx so much Robe Holiday Park Staff

We spent two nights here. If you call for the booking they will check out where to put you on their 40 acre haven. There is an area for family’s with kids with jumping castle etc.  We were in a lovely area amongst the trees. Beautiful bathroom. MASSIVE camp kitchen/hall with laundry. Loved this place. The town is beautiful
